data.title: Simplicity
data.description: WhatsApp embodies simplicity in its user interface and user experience.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design with clear and intuitive pathways.

data.title: Reliability
data.description: A commitment to providing consistent and dependable service.
data.technical_spec: Robust message delivery and fault tolerance built into the architecture.

data.title: Privacy
data.description: Focus on user privacy with strong encryption and no data retention.

data.title: Global Accessibility
data.description: Designed to be accessible and user-friendly for a global audience.
data.technical_spec: Supports multiple languages and operates effectively on diverse network conditions.

data.title: Community
data.description: Encourages interaction and connection between individuals globally.
data.technical_spec: Features like group chats and broadcast lists facilitate community building.
